channel.title: case on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in case on SoundsBrown

item.title: Form factor
item.description: Eurorack “spec”: http://www.doepfer.de/a100_man/a100m_e.htm PSU Regulators http://nozoid.com/diy-eurorack-power-supply/ suggests putting capacitors between each +-12V pin and GND https://aisynthesis.com/diy-eurorack-power-supply-build-guide/ suggests just putting some big-ass capacitors at the start of the line Schottky diodes? Cf. what Kassutronics put on the supply lines of his attenuverter module. http://www.frequencycentral.co.uk/?page_id=894
